svg.text: LRU | LFU | FIFO | ARC | TinyLFU - Decision Process, Complexity & Recommendations
Complexity: Lookup O(1) | Insert O(1) | Evict O(1)
Memory Overhead: 2 pointers per entry (prev + next)
Best for: Recency matters (web caches, sessions)
Complexity: Lookup O(1) | Insert O(1)* | Evict O(1)* (*with HashMap+FreqList)
Memory Overhead: HashMap + frequency counter per entry + linked list nodes
Remove from head (oldest entry). New entries added to tail.
Complexity: O(1) all ops | Memory: Minimal (single queue)
Best for: Simple buffering, log-structured stores, CDN edge caches
Adaptive: Self-tunes between LRU (recency) and LFU (frequency) based on workload.
Complexity: O(1) all ops | Memory: ~2x LRU (ghost entries tracked)
Best for: Database buffer pools, general-purpose caches
New entry admitted only if its
Complexity: Lookup O(k) | Insert O(k) | Evict O(k) where k = hash count
Memory Overhead: ~1.5 bits per entry (CMS) - extremely space efficient
Best for: Caffeine cache, high-throughput apps, low memory footprint
